title: notifications-mail — feature keys
description: Per-provider availability + mail-channel capabilities. Resolved at /auth/me. Downstream: `notifications-mail.enabled` gates channel visibility; per-provider keys let tenants pick their delivery lane.

features.description: Master enable for mail delivery. Off = mail dispatches suppressed.
Enables Mailgun as a selectable mailer.
Enables AWS SES as a selectable mailer. Preferred for EU-hosted tenants (SES eu-central-1).
Enables SendGrid as a selectable mailer.
Enables Postmark as a selectable mailer. Transactional-only.
Enables Resend as a selectable mailer.
Tenant may configure their own SMTP endpoint (enterprise). Overrides provider selection.
Sends from a dedicated IP (SendGrid / SES). Improves deliverability reputation. Enterprise add-on.
